summary: Iter-262 retest of UserDetailModal — previously blocked items (modal opening + Permissions tab navigation) are now FULLY PASSING. All 5 spec items verified end-to-end against the live preview URL. The newly added data-testid='view-user-{id}' and data-testid='edit-user-{id}' on the row action buttons in Users.jsx correctly trigger the modal. Modal renders with 4 tabs, extended Profile fields, editable Edit-mode, Address tab with 5 fields, Permissions tab with 4 navigation cards. Save flow confirmed via network (PUT /api/users/{id} -> 200) and toast 'User updated' is shown. Both goto-roles and goto-user-permissions routing work as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: Users.jsx row action: both eye (view) and pencil (edit) buttons call handleViewUser(user). UX-wise these two buttons currently do the exact same thing — the 'Edit' icon does not jump straight into edit mode. Consider passing { startInEdit: true } when clicking the pencil icon for clearer intent.
UserDetailModal — Save flow is working and persists. Network response 200 + toast confirmed.
Permissions tab navigation correctly closes the modal before navigating (URL changes immediately on click).
test_credentials: admin@test.com / testpassword123 — 2-step: click 'Login to Your Account' -> fill email -> Continue -> fill password -> Login
seed_data_creation: Updated user d47891c2-2d6d-4f01-b893-2351a3c7aa31 (Carter Jr.) id_document_number=TEST_ID_99999. Should be reset by E1 if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-261 blockers are fully resolved. The view-user-{id}/edit-user-{id} buttons in Users.jsx now correctly open the UserDetailModal. All 4 tabs (Profile/Address/Permissions/Activity), editable extended fields (DOB/Gender/ID/Passport), Address tab 5 fields, and Permissions tab 4 navigation cards (goto-user-permissions/goto-roles/goto-matrix/goto-audit-trail) are all wired correctly. Toast 'User updated' confirmed. Network PUT /api/users/{id} returns 200.
rca of the issue: N/A — previous blocker fixed by E1 adding data-testid='view-user-{id}' and data-testid='edit-user-{id}' on the row action buttons in Users.jsx (L731-748). Verified clicking either button calls handleViewUser(user) which sets selectedUser + opens isDetailModalOpen, rendering the Dialog from UserDetailModal.
